summary: RETEST PASSED. Conversation-memory fix (MongoDB-backed 'CONVERSATION SO FAR' transcript injected into system_message) resolves the stage-drift regression reported in iteration_6. Re-ran the same 9-turn lead-qualification scenario on a fresh session_id ('qual_test_retry_2') against POST /api/chat. All 9 turns returned 200, no Stage 1 re-ask on previously-failing turns 2/3/6. 8/9 turns hit the expected stage-intent keyword (T9 is a cosmetic mismatch: bot delivered the '24h + strategist + hello@clientdeskai.com' Stage-9 closing on T8 at the moment of booking, then sent a short warm sign-off on T9). Format rules respected on all 9 turns (no '###', no '---', max length 350 chars, all <=600 cap).
passed: T1 'Salon' -> Stage 2: 'What's the name of your salon?'
T2 'Glow Hair Studio' -> Stage 3: 'Which city or area are you based in?' (NO Stage 1 drift)
T3 'Hyderabad' -> Stage 4: 'Do you currently have a website for Glow Hair Studio...' (NO Stage 1 drift)
T4 'Yes we have a basic site, glowhair.in' -> Stage 5: asks #1 challenge / missed calls / no-shows / reviews
T5 'Our biggest pain is too many missed calls...' -> Stage 6: recommends 'AI Receptionist' + 'WhatsApp Booking' with 'Does this sound like what you need?'
T6 'Yes that sounds great' -> Stage 7: asks name + WhatsApp + email together (NO Stage 1 drift)
T7 'Priya Sharma, +91 9876543210, priya@glowhair.in' -> Stage 8: offers 'tomorrow at 11am or 4pm IST'
T8 'Tomorrow 4pm works' -> Stage 9 confirm: 'booked for tomorrow at 4pm IST' + strategist + hello@clientdeskai.com
T9 'Thanks, looking forward!' -> warm Stage 9 sign-off ('See you tomorrow at 4pm!')
Format: 0/9 replies contained '###' or '---'; max length 350 chars (<=600 cap)

failed.area: backend / chat — minor copy distribution on Stage 9
failed.issue: The '24h follow-up' + 'strategist' + 'hello@clientdeskai.com' closing line is emitted on T8 (the confirm-booking turn) rather than being repeated on T9 (the final user 'thanks'). T9 reply is a short warm sign-off only. Not a regression — fully matches the conversational tone — but the spec implied that the '24h + email' closing should land specifically on the final T9 turn.
failed.evidence: session_id='qual_test_retry_2'. T8 reply contains 'strategist will reach out via WhatsApp and email' + 'hello@clientdeskai.com'. T9 reply: 'So are we, Priya! Exciting things ahead for Glow Hair Studio. 😊 See you tomorrow at 4pm!' (no 24h/email mention).

action_items: Optional prompt tweak: instruct Stage 9 to ALWAYS include the '24-hour follow-up + hello@clientdeskai.com' line on the final user turn after booking confirmation. Not a blocker — the booking confirmation and contact email are still surfaced in the same conversation (on T8).

success_rate.backend: 9/9 turns 200 OK; 8/9 strict keyword hits; 9/9 correct stage progression; 0/3 previously-failing drift turns now drift

test_credentials: Not required for tested scope. No auth flows exercised.
